creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Since the compilation problem has been resolved, I'll close this PR. 
However, I am going to update the pdftk Makfile to explicitly depend 
on gcj??, since the USE_GCC directive only adds a dependency on 
lang/gcc?? and it's possible that the port was built without Java support. 
In that case, the gcc port will have to be deinstalled, reconfigured with 
Java support and reinstalled before the pdftk build works properly.
